parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-1 per-exercise e1RM parity — low-confidence branches + filterAnalyticsHistory exclusion. Four completed push-a bench-press sessions each trip a distinct low-confidence signal (poor technique / pain flag / reps>12 / rir>=4), so no recent high-quality candidate survives: current is undefined and best falls back to candidates[0] at low confidence. TWO higher-weight, high-quality sessions are present but MUST be excluded by filterAnalyticsHistory — one dataFlag='test', one back-filled (claimed 40 days ago, actually started today, beyond the 7-day tolerance) — proving the engine ignores both. If the filter were broken these would dominate current/best, so the golden pins the exclusion. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (push-a / bench-press). Low-quality: s1 poor technique, s2 pain, s3 reps 15, s4 rir 5. Excluded: s5 dataFlag 'test' (most recent, w100), s6 back-filled (claimed daysAgo 40, startedAt today). Correct filterAnalyticsHistory drops s5+s6 => current undefined, best = candidates[0] (s1, low).
